stories.title: U.S. Open weekend storylines: Can anyone catch Wyn...
stories.summary: Who could chase Clark down? Will Shinnecock be harder Saturday and Sunday? We break down what to watch heading into the weekend at the 2026 U.S. Open.

stories.title: U.S. clinches WC Group D after Paraguay victory
stories.summary: Paraguay held on for a 1-0 win over Turkey after playing a man down for more than half the match, a result that secured the United States the top spot in Group D

stories.title: U.S. winning the WC not 'ridiculous,' Richards say...
stories.summary: Zlatan Ibrahimovic was succinct in saying he thinks that the USMNT has a chance to win the World Cup. Chris Richards doesn't think it's a wild idea at all, either.

stories.title: Source: Big 12 monitoring Sorsby fallout, options
stories.summary: The Big 12 presidents and chancellors haven't rushed to pull the league's recently filed federal lawsuit because there are still questions about Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby's NFL future and any possible legal retribution, a source told ESPN.

stories.title: RHP Misiorowski hits 104.2 mph in Brewers' loss
stories.summary: Brewers ace Jacob Misiorowski had another strong outing against the Braves, topping out at 104.2 mph, but it may not have been strong enough during a 3-2 loss.
